data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla At Risk Of Being Removed From EV Incentive Program In UK After Canada
data.description: UK negotiates with US to avoid auto tariffs. Finance Minister emphasizes need for exemption, potential reassessment of Tesla subsidies.

data.title: 50 Cent Once Said He Was 'Thinking Like A Harvard Guy' When Building His Headphone Brand — But Whatever Happened To The Ambitious Startup, SMS Audio
data.description: Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson once boasted he was "thinking like a Harvard guy" when launching SMS Audio, but despite early buzz and celebrity backing, the headphone brand folded by 2016 — a casualty of fierce competition and legal troubles that led to his 2015 bankruptcy filing.

data.title: China's Top Chipmaker SMIC Accused Of Poaching Taiwan's Engineers Via Samoan Front Company
data.description: Taiwan is investigating whether China's chipmaker SMIC used a fake Samoan front company to illegally recruit local semiconductor engineers.

data.title: Trump's Auto Tariffs Spark Short Squeeze Rally in Hertz And Avis, But Will It Last?
data.description: Beaten-down auto rental stocks, Hertz Global Holdings Inc. and Avis Budget Group Inc. were sent blazing on Thursday.

data.title: Why Braze Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 12%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
